name: claude-wiki-plugins
description: Marketplace hosting the claude-wiki plugin family

plugins.name: claude-wiki
plugins.description: Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern for Obsidian + Claude Cowork. JP default, EN fallback. Requires kepano/obsidian-skills (hard dependency). Pre-release: 4 skills (setup-claude-wiki, add-page, lint-vault, query-wiki) + .obsidian/ write-guard hook shipped; 統合 dogfood follows before v0.1.0 stable cut.
